name: OpenClaw (Secure)
description: Self-hosted personal AI assistant via WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord and more. Hardened deployment: loopback-only gateway, required token auth, DM allowlist, sandbox for group sessions, non-root container.

variables.name: GATEWAY_TOKEN
variables.description: Auth token for the OpenClaw gateway. REQUIRED. Min 32 chars. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

variables.name: SETUP_PASSWORD
variables.description: Password for the /setup wizard. REQUIRED. Min 12 chars.

variables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
variables.description: Anthropic API key (for Claude models). Provide this OR OPENROUTER_API_KEY.

variables.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
variables.description: OpenRouter API key (access to GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini via one key).

variables.name: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
variables.description: Telegram bot token from @BotFather. Optional — enables Telegram channel.

variables.name: DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN
variables.description: Discord bot token. Optional — enables Discord channel.
